name: Bomb Box
description: A tense new box type: once opened, a bomb starts counting down. Defuse it by tapping it again before the counter hits zero — or watch it go off on its own!
howToPlay: Tap a bomb box to open it and start the fuse. Each other box you tap ticks the counter down by 1. Tap the bomb box again before it hits 0 to defuse it. If you ignore it, it explodes automatically (releasing its marbles with a bang).
